name: faff
description: faff.run — personal coaching app. Production currently builds from legacy/web (Next.js) until cutover to web-v2. See docs/coach/mockups/deck-v1-2026-05-25.html for the canonical design system.

scripts.build: cd legacy/web && npm install && npm run build
scripts.v2:build: cd web-v2 && npm install && npm run build
